description: Square graphic. The right two-thirds is a photograph of a person's hands typing on a silver laptop keyboard, with a smartphone resting on a wooden desk in the foreground; the person wears a light blue-and-white pinstriped collared shirt. The left third is a darkened, desaturated continuation of the photo used as a backdrop for text. Overlaid on the photo, centered-right, is a large white outline illustration of a document with horizontal text lines and an oversized white checkmark. The DHS circular seal appears at the top left next to bold grey serif text reading 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement.' Left-aligned white and colored sans-serif text reads: 'SUBMIT' (small), then very large 'DHS FORM' in white, 'G-28' in cyan-blue, then in white with two phrases highlighted in yellow: '"NOTICE OF ENTRY OF APPEARANCE AS ATTORNEY OR ACCREDITED REPRESENTATIVE" WITH ICE ONLINE AT:' followed by 'ICE.gov/eFILE' in white serif. The background is a stock photo with navy, cyan, and yellow accents.
notable_text: SUBMIT DHS FORM G-28 "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF APPEARANCE AS ATTORNEY OR ACCREDITED REPRESENTATIVE" WITH ICE ONLINE AT: ICE.gov/eFILE
